_comment: Representative CRM retrieval fixtures for `dxcrm eval-embeddings` (#20). Documents are anonymized, synthetic interaction/KB snippets spanning the topics that matter for a sales+support CRM (pricing, security, onboarding, churn risk, integrations, renewals, billing). Queries are phrased the way a rep/agent actually asks. Run: `dxcrm eval-embeddings eval/embedding-fixtures.json --k 5` for the current model, then re-run with DXCRM_EMBED_MODEL=<candidate> to compare recall@k / MRR before any default swap.

documents.text: CFO raised concerns about the enterprise license price; asked for a 15% discount and annual prepay terms before signing the renewal.
Sent the updated quote with volume tiers. Procurement wants net-60 payment terms instead of net-30.
Security review: customer requires SOC 2 Type II report and SSO via SAML before go-live. Sent the trust center link.
InfoSec questionnaire returned. They flagged data residency — need EU hosting and a signed DPA under GDPR.
Kickoff call done. Onboarding plan: data import week 1, admin training week 2, go-live week 3. Champion is the VP of Ops.
Admin training completed; users created. Outstanding: configure the Slack integration and import historical tickets.
Usage dropped 40% this month and the main champion left the company. High churn risk — schedule an executive business review.
Customer opened three support tickets about slow exports and is unhappy. Sentiment negative; renewal at risk in 60 days.
They want a two-way Salesforce sync and a webhook into their data warehouse. Asked about API rate limits.
Configured the HubSpot import and the Gmail sync. Next: connect the Stripe payment link for online quote acceptance.
Annual renewal is up in 30 days. Economic buyer confirmed budget; legal is reviewing the MSA redlines.
Invoice dispute: customer was double-charged for seats after an upgrade. Issued a credit and escalated to finance.

queries.query: Who is worried about the contract price and wants a discount?
What are the security and compliance requirements (SOC 2, SSO, GDPR)?
Where are we in the onboarding plan?
Which accounts are at risk of churning?
What integrations does the customer need?
When is the renewal and who signs off on budget?
Was there a billing or invoice problem?
